summary: Schweizer Electronic AG is a German manufacturer of printed circuit boards (PCBs). The company produces PCBs for automotive, industrial, medical, and communication applications. Schweizer Electronic is headquartered in Schramberg, Germany.

name: DR HOENLE AG
summary: Dr. Hoenle AG is a German technology company that develops, manufactures, and distributes UV technology solutions. The company's products are used in a variety of applications, including printing, electronics, and pharmaceuticals. Dr. Hoenle AG is headquartered in Gräfelfing, Germany.

name: Berentzen-Gruppe AG
summary: Berentzen-Gruppe AG is a German beverage company producing and marketing alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages. Its product portfolio includes spirits, liqueurs, and fruit juices. The company is headquartered in Haselünne, Germany.

name: Biotest GmbH & Co. KGaA
summary: Biotest AG is a German biopharmaceutical company specializing in hematology, immunology, and intensive care medicine. The company develops and manufactures plasma protein products and biotherapeutic drugs. Biotest AG is headquartered in Dreieich, Germany.

name: ORBIS AG
summary: ORBIS AG is a German IT consulting and system integration company. The company focuses on providing IT solutions for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). ORBIS AG is headquartered in Saarbrücken, Germany.

name: ISRA VISION AG
summary: Isra Vision AG develops and markets machine vision solutions for industrial applications. Their products are used for quality control, surface inspection, and robot guidance. Isra Vision is headquartered in Darmstadt, Germany.

name: BORUSSIA DORTMUND GMBH & CO
summary: Borussia Dortmund GmbH & Co. KGaA operates the professional football club Borussia Dortmund. The company generates revenue from matchday income, broadcasting rights, merchandising, and sponsorships. Borussia Dortmund is based in Dortmund, Germany.

name: HOLIDAYCHECK GROUP AG
summary: HolidayCheck Group AG operates an online travel portal. The portal allows users to search for and book hotels, cruises, and other travel-related services. HolidayCheck Group is headquartered in Bottighofen, Switzerland.

name: Geratherm Medical AG
summary: Geratherm Medical AG is a German manufacturer of medical devices for temperature management and health monitoring. The company produces thermometers, blood pressure monitors, and other medical products. Geratherm Medical is headquartered in Geschwenda, Germany.

name: AXEL SPRINGER SE
summary: Axel Springer SE is a German media and technology company. The company operates in various segments, including news media, classifieds media, and marketing services. Axel Springer is headquartered in Berlin, Germany.

name: EUWAX AG
summary: EUWAX AG is a German stock exchange that specializes in trading structured products. It is a subsidiary of Boerse Stuttgart Group and facilitates the trading of warrants, certificates, and other investment products. EUWAX AG is based in Stuttgart, Germany.

name: LS telcom AG
summary: LS telcom AG provides software and hardware solutions for spectrum management, radio monitoring, and electromagnetic compatibility analysis, enabling efficient use of radio frequencies worldwide with headquarters in Lichtenau, Germany. The company's products and services help regulators, mobile network operators, and other organizations plan and optimize their radio networks, avoid interference, and ensure compliance with regulations. This ensures optimal frequency usage for its customers.

name: init innovation in traffic systems SE
FORTEC Elektronik AG
summary: FORTEC Elektronik AG develops and distributes standardized and customized solutions in the field of display technology, embedded systems, and power supplies, headquartered in Germering, Germany. The company offers a wide range of products, including TFT displays, touchscreens, embedded boards, and power supplies, catering to various industrial applications. FORTEC also provides engineering services and support to its customers.

name: GFT Technologies SE
summary: GFT Technologies SE is a global technology company providing IT consulting and software engineering services to the financial services, insurance, and manufacturing industries, headquartered in Stuttgart, Germany. They specialize in digital transformation, cloud computing, and artificial intelligence solutions. GFT helps clients modernize their IT systems and develop innovative business models.

name: BILFINGER SE
summary: Bilfinger SE is an international industrial services provider offering engineering, construction, maintenance, and digital solutions for industrial plants, power plants, and real estate, headquartered in Mannheim, Germany. The company's services cover the entire life cycle of assets, from planning and construction to maintenance and decommissioning. Bilfinger focuses on increasing the efficiency and sustainability of its clients' operations.

name: COVESTRO AG
summary: Covestro AG is a leading manufacturer of high-tech polymer materials, producing raw materials for polyurethanes, polycarbonates, and specialty chemicals, headquartered in Leverkusen, Germany. The company's products are used in a wide range of applications, including automotive, construction, electronics, and healthcare. Covestro is committed to sustainable development and innovation.

name: KAP AG
summary: KAP AG is an industrial holding company that acquires and develops medium-sized companies in different industrial sectors, headquartered in Fulda, Germany. The company focuses on businesses with operational improvement potential and long-term growth prospects. KAP AG aims to create value by implementing operational excellence and strategic development initiatives.

name: MEDICLIN Aktiengesellschaft
summary: MEDICLIN AG operates a network of hospitals, rehabilitation clinics, and nursing homes across Germany, providing a range of medical and rehabilitation services, headquartered in Offenburg, Germany. The company offers specialized treatments for various conditions, including neurological, orthopedic, and cardiovascular diseases, as well as geriatric care. MEDICLIN focuses on delivering high-quality medical care and rehabilitation services.

name: MORPHOSYS AG
summary: MorphoSys AG is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development, and commercialization of innovative therapies for serious diseases, headquartered in Planegg, Germany. The company utilizes its proprietary technology platforms, including antibody technologies, to develop novel drug candidates. MorphoSys collaborates with pharmaceutical companies to advance its pipeline of therapeutic programs.

name: AUDI AG
summary: AUDI AG is a German automobile manufacturer that designs, engineers, produces, markets, and distributes luxury vehicles. It is a subsidiary of the Volkswagen Group and operates worldwide. Audi is headquartered in Ingolstadt, Bavaria, Germany.

name: AURUBIS AG
summary: Aurubis AG is a leading integrated copper producer and recycler worldwide, processing copper concentrates, scrap, and other recycling materials into a range of copper products, headquartered in Hamburg, Germany. The company's products include copper cathodes, wire rod, shapes, and precious metals. Aurubis focuses on sustainable production and efficient resource management.

name: KWS SAAT SE & Co KGaA
summary: KWS SAAT SE & Co. KGaA develops, produces, and distributes seeds for various crops, including sugar beet, corn, cereals, and oilseed rape, headquartered in Einbeck, Germany. The company conducts extensive research and development to improve crop yields, disease resistance, and other agronomic traits. KWS SAAT serves farmers worldwide with high-quality seeds and innovative solutions.

name: SNP Schneider-Neureither & Partner SE
summary: SNP Schneider-Neureither & Partner SE provides software and consulting services for business transformation and data migration, headquartered in Heidelberg, Germany. The company's CrystalBridge platform enables automated data migration and system landscape transformation. SNP helps organizations streamline their IT landscapes and accelerate their digital transformation initiatives.

name: CECONOMY AG
summary: Ceconomy AG is a leading consumer electronics retailer in Europe, operating through its MediaMarkt and Saturn retail brands, headquartered in Düsseldorf, Germany. The company offers a wide range of consumer electronics, appliances, and related services. Ceconomy focuses on providing omnichannel shopping experiences and expanding its digital business.

name: secunet Security Networks AG
summary: secunet Security Networks AG is a leading German provider of high-security IT solutions, developing and implementing solutions for government agencies, businesses, and critical infrastructure operators, headquartered in Essen, Germany. Their offerings include cybersecurity products and services, secure communication solutions, and border control systems. Secunet focuses on protecting sensitive data and ensuring secure IT operations.

name: IVU Traffic Technologies AG
summary: IVU Traffic Technologies AG develops, integrates, and operates IT solutions for public transport, providing software for planning, dispatching, and managing bus and rail operations, headquartered in Berlin, Germany. The company's IVU.suite platform helps transportation companies optimize their operations, improve efficiency, and enhance passenger experience. IVU Traffic Technologies serves public transport operators worldwide.

name: Deutsche EuroShop AG
summary: Deutsche EuroShop AG is a German real estate investment company that invests in shopping centers in prime locations, headquartered in Hamburg, Germany. The company owns a portfolio of shopping centers across Europe. Deutsche EuroShop aims to generate stable rental income and long-term value growth.

name: Deutsche Pfandbriefbank AG
summary: Deutsche Pfandbriefbank AG (pbb) is a German specialized bank focusing on commercial real estate finance and public sector finance, headquartered in Garching near Munich, Germany. The bank provides financing solutions for real estate projects and infrastructure investments. Pbb operates in Europe and the United States.

name: VITA 34 AG
summary: Vita 34 AG is a German biotechnology company specializing in the cryopreservation of umbilical cord blood stem cells for potential future medical treatments, headquartered in Leipzig, Germany. They offer services for storing stem cells for families and provide stem cell products for therapeutic applications. Vita 34 is focused on advancing regenerative medicine.

name: Manz AG
summary: Manz AG is a global high-tech equipment manufacturer supplying the solar, electronics, and battery industries with production equipment, headquartered in Reutlingen, Germany. The company develops and manufactures automation, laser processing, wet chemical processes, and coating systems. Manz supports its customers in increasing efficiency and reducing costs in their manufacturing processes.

name: Hamburger Hafen und Logistik AG
summary: Hamburger Hafen und Logistik AG (HHLA) is a leading port logistics company in Europe, operating container terminals, intermodal transport services, and logistics facilities, headquartered in Hamburg, Germany. The company handles container traffic, transports goods by rail, truck, and barge, and provides a range of logistics services. HHLA focuses on sustainable and efficient port operations.

name: Eyemaxx Real Estate AG
summary: Eyemaxx Real Estate AG is a real estate developer focusing on commercial and residential properties in Germany and Austria, headquartered in Aschaffenburg, Germany. The company develops office buildings, retail properties, and residential projects. Eyemaxx focuses on sustainable building practices and innovative concepts.

name: Heidelberg Pharma AG
summary: Heidelberg Pharma AG is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) for cancer treatment, headquartered in Ladenburg, Germany. The company's proprietary technology platform enables the development of highly targeted and effective cancer therapies. Heidelberg Pharma aims to improve the lives of cancer patients.

name: NorCom Information Technology GmbH & Co. KGaA
4SC AG
summary: 4SC AG is a German biotechnology company focused on the discovery and development of small-molecule drugs for cancer and autoimmune diseases, headquartered in Martinsried/Planegg, Germany. The company's pipeline includes clinical-stage drug candidates targeting key pathways involved in disease progression. 4SC aims to develop innovative therapies with improved efficacy and safety profiles.

name: AS CREATION TAPETEN AG
summary: AS Creation Tapeten AG manufactures and sells wallpaper and decorative products, headquartered in Gummersbach, Germany. The company offers a wide range of wallpaper designs and patterns for residential and commercial applications. AS Creation Tapeten distributes its products through retailers and wholesalers worldwide.

name: YOUBISHENG GREEN PAPER AG
summary: YOUBISHENG GREEN PAPER AG is a Chinese company specializing in the production and sale of various types of specialty paper, including thermal paper, carbonless paper, and label paper. Their products are used in a wide range of applications, such as point-of-sale systems, logistics, and printing. The company is based in China.

name: MYBET HOLDING SE
summary: MYBET HOLDING SE is a German-based company that was focused on operating online sports betting and gaming platforms. However, the company filed for insolvency in 2018 and its current status and operations are unclear. Formerly headquartered in Berlin, Germany, the company aimed to provide a wide range of betting and gaming services to customers.

name: WESTWING GROUP SE
summary: Westwing Group SE operates an e-commerce platform for home and living products, offering a curated selection of furniture, accessories, and home decor, headquartered in Munich, Germany. The company's online store features daily sales events and exclusive collections. Westwing Group serves customers in Europe and other regions.

name: Traumhaus AG
summary: Traumhaus AG develops and builds prefabricated houses, offering customizable and energy-efficient homes for families, headquartered in Limburg an der Lahn, Germany. They provide various house models, from single-family homes to multi-story buildings, with a focus on sustainable construction methods. Traumhaus aims to make homeownership affordable and accessible.

name: INSTONE REAL ESTATE GROUP SE
summary: Instone Real Estate Group SE is a residential developer in Germany, developing and building multi-family homes and apartments in urban locations, headquartered in Essen, Germany. The company focuses on sustainable building practices and modern living concepts. Instone Real Estate aims to create attractive and affordable housing solutions.

name: LEG IMMOBILIEN SE
summary: LEG IMMOBILIEN SE is a German residential real estate company. They own and manage a large portfolio of residential properties, primarily in North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. The company is headquartered in Düsseldorf, Germany.

name: PROSIEBENSAT.1 MEDIA SE
summary: PROSIEBENSAT.1 MEDIA SE is a German media company. They operate a portfolio of television channels, digital platforms, and production companies across Europe. The company is headquartered in Unterföhring, Germany.

name: SKW STAHL-METALLURGIE HOLDIN
summary: SKW STAHL-METALLURGIE HOLDIN is a German company specializing in metallurgical chemistry. They supply products and solutions for steel desulphurization, secondary metallurgy, and other applications in the steel industry. The company is headquartered in Unterneukirchen, Germany.

name: SYMRISE AG
summary: SYMRISE AG is a global supplier of fragrances, flavorings, cosmetic active ingredients and raw materials, as well as functional ingredients. They develop, produce and sell these products for use in perfumes, cosmetics, food and beverages, pharmaceuticals and other industries. The company is headquartered in Holzminden, Germany.

name: SILTRONIC AG
summary: SILTRONIC AG is a German manufacturer of silicon wafers. They are a leading supplier of hyperpure silicon wafers for the semiconductor industry. The company is headquartered in Munich, Germany.

name: Dottikon Es Holding AG
summary: Dottikon Es Holding AG manufactures and sells performance chemicals, intermediates, and active pharmaceutical ingredients for the chemical and pharmaceutical industries in Switzerland and internationally. The company's chemicals and intermediates include amines, anilines, azaindoles, benzimidazoles, benzoic acid derivatives, benzyl compounds, boron building blocks, chiral compounds, cyclohexane derivatives, cyclopropyl building blocks, indazoles, indoles, N-heterocycles, nitrate esters, nitroaromatic compounds, O-heterocycles, phenols and anisoles, and pyridine building blocks. It also provides Dottisol, an isosorbide dimethyl ether for application as a solubility enhancer in cosmetic, and pharma and agro products, as well as a performance additive in various industries. In addition, the company engages in the recycling and waste treatment activities; and provision of consulting services for investment companies. Dottikon Es Holding AG was founded in 1913 and is headquartered in Dottikon, Switzerland. Dottikon Es Holding AG is a subsidiary of EVOLMA Holding AG.

name: GN Store Nord A/S
summary: GN Store Nord A/S is a Danish company that develops, manufactures, and markets audio and video solutions. The company operates through its Jabra (audio) and ReSound (hearing aids) divisions. GN Store Nord is headquartered in Ballerup, Denmark.

name: DSV A/S
summary: DSV A/S is a Danish transport and logistics company that provides supply chain solutions worldwide. The company offers services including air and sea freight, road transport, and warehousing. DSV is headquartered in Hedehusene, Denmark.

name: ORSTED A/S
summary: Ørsted A/S is a Danish energy company focused on renewable energy, particularly offshore wind power. They develop, construct, and operate wind farms. The company is headquartered in Fredericia, Denmark.

name: CHR HANSEN HOLDING A/S
summary: Chr. Hansen Holding A/S is a Danish bioscience company that develops and produces cultures, enzymes, and probiotics for the food, beverage, dietary supplements, and pharmaceutical industries. The company serves a global market with its ingredient solutions. Chr. Hansen is headquartered in Hørsholm, Denmark.

name: NOVOZYMES A/S-B SHARES
summary: Novozymes A/S is a Danish biotechnology company specializing in the production of enzymes and microorganisms. They provide biological solutions for a wide range of industries, including food, agriculture, and biofuels. Novozymes is headquartered in Bagsvaerd, Denmark.

name: DKSH Holding AG
summary: DKSH Holding AG provides various market expansion services in Thailand, Greater China, Malaysia, Singapore, rest of the Asia Pacific, Europe, and internationally. The company offers sourcing, marketing, sales, distribution, and after-sales services. It operates through four segments: Healthcare, Consumer Goods, Performance Materials, and Technology. The Healthcare segment provides various services, such as registration, regulatory, market entry studies, importation, customs clearance, marketing and sales, physical distribution, invoicing, and cash collection services for ethical pharmaceuticals, consumer health, and over-the-counter health products, as well as medical devices. The Consumer Goods segment offers a range of services, including product feasibility studies, registration, importation, customs clearance, marketing and merchandising, sales, warehousing, physical distribution, invoicing, cash collection, and after-sales services for fast moving consumer goods, food services, luxury goods, and fashion and lifestyle products, as well as hair and skin cosmetics. The Performance Materials segment sources, markets, and distributes a range of specialty chemicals and ingredients for the pharmaceutical, personal care, food and beverage, and industrial applications, as well as provides market expansion services for performance materials. The Technology segment offers market expansion services comprising a range of capital investment goods and analytical instruments in the areas of infrastructure, industrial materials and supplies, precision and textile machinery, semiconductors, photovoltaic and electronics, agriculture, and hospitality, as well as specialized industrial applications. The company was founded in 1865 and is based in Zurich, Switzerland.

name: dormakaba Holding AG
summary: dormakaba Holding AG provides access and security solutions worldwide. The company operates through Access Solutions AMER, Access Solutions APAC, Access Solutions DACH, Access Solutions EMEA, and Key?&?Wall Solutions segments. It offers door hardware products, such as door closer systems, door locks, escape route systems, electrical strikes, and panic hardware systems; entrance systems, including automatic sliding, revolving, swing, and barrier free opening doors, as well as sensor barriers, security interlocks, exit lanes, and turnstiles; and access control systems for corporate, SAP, small and medium enterprises, microenterprises, and residential customers. The company also provides mechanical and master key systems; lodging systems comprising electronic hotel locks and access management software; safe locks; interior glass systems, which include manual single and double-action, and manual sliding door, as well as access and room, and horizontal sliding wall systems; and contactless identification systems and trusted services based on the legic smartcard and connect technologies. In addition, it offers key systems and key cutting machines; and movable walls. The company offers its products to hotels, shops, sporting venues, airports, hospitals, homes, and offices. dormakaba Holding AG was founded in 1862 and is headquartered in R√É¬ºmlang, Switzerland.

name: Dufry AG
summary: Dufry AG operates as a travel retailer worldwide. The company operates various store concepts, including general travel retail shops under the Dufry, World Duty Free, Nuance, Hellenic Duty Free, Colombian Emeralds, Duty Free Uruguay, Hudson, Duty Free Shop Argentina, and RegStaer brands; Dufry shopping stores; brand boutiques; convenience stores primarily under the Hudson brand; and specialized shops and theme stores. Its retail shops offers perfumes and cosmetics, food and confectionery, wines and spirits, watches and jewelry, fashion and leather, tobacco goods, souvenirs, electronics, soft drinks, confectionery, packaged food, travel accessories, personal items, sunglasses, destination merchandise, and other products, as well as newspapers, magazines, and books. As of March 25, 2021, the company operated approximately 2,300 duty-free and duty-paid shops located at airports, cruise liners, seaports, railway stations, and downtown tourist areas. Dufry AG was incorporated in 1865 and is headquartered in Basel, Switzerland.

name: Energiedienst Holding AG
summary: Energiedienst Holding AG produces, distributes, and sells electricity in Switzerland. It generates electricity from hydro, gas, sun, and wind sources. The company also provides heating solutions. It serves approximately 270,000 private and commercial customers. The company is based in Laufenburg, Switzerland. Energiedienst Holding AG is a subsidiary of EnBW Energie Baden-W√É¬ºrttemberg AG.
industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers

name: EFG International AG
summary: EFG International AG, together with its subsidiaries, provides private banking, wealth management, and asset management services to individual and business clients. It offers investment solutions, including asset management mandate, advisory, investment fund, third party-fund selection, structured product, alternative investment, and trading services; wealth solutions, such as fund service, wealth planning, pension products, and credit and financing services comprising property and investment finance; eBanking, mobile banking, and security services; and other banking services consisting of accounts and cards, as well as custody, foreign exchange and treasury, and client reporting. The company also provides investment advisory services and commercial banking services, as well as supports independent asset managers to set up private label funds. It operates in Europe, Asia Pacific, the Americas, and the Middle East. EFG International AG was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland.

name: Elma Electronic AG
summary: Elma Electronic AG manufactures and sells electronic packaging products for the embedded systems market worldwide. It offers backplanes; chassis platforms; cabinet products, including cabinets and racks, mobile carts, cases and enclosures, and accessories; and embedded boards comprising single board computers, storage modules, ethernet switches, carriers and adapters, FPGAs, and and I/O communication products. The company also provides embedded computing systems; enclosures and components, including table and small housings, subracks, housing components, front panels, and handles and accessories for computer housings; power solutions comprising power distribution boards, modular solutions, power systems, PSU product configurator, and standard power supplies; and rotary switches, including encoders, knobs and caps, LED'S, audio solutions, selector and coded switches, multi rotary switches, and mentor components. The company serves aerospace and defense, industrial, communications, transportation, energy, medical, science and research, test and measurement, broadcast, and audio/video industries. Elma Electronic AG was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Wetzikon, Switzerland.

name: Emmi AG
summary: Emmi AG develops, produces, and markets a range of dairy and fresh products primarily in Switzerland, the Americas, and Europe. Its offers cow, goat, and sheep milk; mozzarella and fresh cheese, yogurt, drinking milk, and butter; fondue; energy milk and caff√É¬® latte; ice cream; whey powder; protein products and milk powder/concentrates. Emmi AG also exports its products to approximately 60 countries. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Lucerne, Switzerland. Emmi AG is a subsidiary of ZMP Invest AG.

name: EMS-CHEMIE HOLDING AG
summary: EMS-CHEMIE HOLDING AG engages in the high performance polymers and specialty chemicals businesses worldwide. The company's High Performance Polymers segment is involved in the manufacture and supply of high performance polyamides and polyamide materials; and supply of adhesives, sealants, and coatings, including application engineering systems. Its Specialty Chemicals segment develops, produces, and sells fibers, fusible adhesives, and adhesive yarns for technical and textile applications; adhesion promoters for the tire industry; powder coatings; and reactive diluents. EMS-CHEMIE HOLDING AG serves automotive, electro and electronic, industry and consumer goods, optic, and packaging markets. The company was founded in 1936 and is based in Domat/Ems, Switzerland. EMS-CHEMIE HOLDING AG is a subsidiary of EMESTA HOLDING AG.

name: Eastern Property Holdings Limited
summary: Eastern Property Holdings Ltd. is an investment company listed on SIX Swiss Exchange which holds interest in office, residential and retail properties. EPH is managed by Valartis International Ltd. a wholly-owned subsidiary of Valartis Group AG.

name: Edisun Power Europe AG
summary: Edisun Power Europe AG, together with its subsidiaries, finances and operates photovoltaic systems in Europe. It also sells solar energy to local electricity companies. As of December 30, 2020, the company owned and operated 38 solar power plants with total capacity of 83.7 megawatts in Switzerland, Germany, France, Italy, Portugal, and Spain. Edisun Power Europe AG was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland.
industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers

name: Evolva Holding SA
summary: Evolva Holding SA discovers, develops, and commercializes ingredients for use in food, nutrition, personal healthcare, agriculture, and other sectors in Switzerland, the United States, and internationally. It offers branded ingredients, such as Veri-te Resveratrol, a natural ingredient in grapes, as well as other plants, including peanuts, cranberries, and Japanese knotweed for use in age-related health conditions; Nootkashield for pest control applications; EverSweet Stevia, a sweetener use in food, beverages, and table-top sweeteners; Nootkatone, an ingredient for flavour and fragrance applications; Valencene, an aroma ingredient; and Vanillin, an extracted from the seed pods of the vanilla orchid and is made up of a complex mixture of taste components. It serves the nutrition, flavors and fragrances, animal health, personal care, and pharmaceutical markets. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Reinach, Switzerland.

name: Formulafirst Limited
summary: Formulafirst Limited is a balanced mutual fund launched and managed by 2trade Group Limited. The fund invests in the public equity and fixed income markets across the Europe and the United States with a focus on central European countries such Switzerland, Austria and Germany. It also invests in convertible instruments, options, futures, and funds. The fund makes its investments in securities of companies operating across diversified sectors. It primarily uses value investment strategy to invest in companies with market capitalization of more than EUR 100 million. The fund employs a fundamental analysis with bottom-up approach to make its investments. It benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against the MSCI World Index. The fund conducts in-house research to make its investments. Formulafirst Limited was formed on December 29, 1994 and is domiciled in British Virgin Islands.

name: Flughafen Zurich AG
summary: Flughafen Z√É¬ºrich AG operates the Z√É¬ºrich Airport in Switzerland. It provides infrastructure and services related to flight operations, including the runway system, apron zones, passenger zones in the terminals, freight operations, passenger handling and services, and safety; support for passengers with reduced mobility; and check-in areas and facilities, baggage sorting and handling system, aircraft power supply system, handling apron areas, and the related services. The company also offers passenger and aircraft security measures with systems and their operation and maintenance designed to prevent actions that affect the security of commercial civil aviation, in primarily facilities for checks on passengers, hand luggage, checked baggage, and freight. In addition, it provides air security-related equipment and services comprising relevant systems and their operation and maintenance; and airport policing duties, con surveillance patrols and other security-related duties. Further, the company develops, markets, and operates the commercial infrastructure at Zurich Airport, including retail and restaurant/catering operations at the airport, renting premises, parking services, and various commercial services; and shopping, entertainment, and services centre. Flughafen Z√É¬ºrich AG was founded in 2000 and is based in Zurich, Switzerland.

name: ELISA OYJ
summary: ELISA OYJ is a Finnish telecommunications, ICT and online service company. It provides fixed and mobile subscriptions, broadband and online services for consumers, and ICT services for enterprises and public administration. Elisa is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.

name: ORION OYJ-CLASS A
summary: Orion Oyj is a Finnish pharmaceutical company that develops, manufactures and markets human and veterinary pharmaceuticals and active pharmaceutical ingredients. Its product portfolio includes prescription medicines, self-care products, and veterinary medicines. The company is headquartered in Espoo, Finland.

name: METSO OUTOTEC OYJ
summary: Metso Outotec Oyj is a Finnish company that provides technologies and services for the aggregates, mining, metals refining and recycling industries. The company offers equipment, systems, and solutions for crushing, screening, grinding, and processing various materials. Metso Outotec is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.

name: YIT OYJ
summary: YIT Oyj is a Finnish construction company that develops and builds apartments, business premises, infrastructure, and entire areas. The company operates in Finland, Russia, Scandinavia, and Central Eastern Europe. YIT is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.

name: CAVERION OYJ
summary: Caverion Oyj is a Finnish company that provides technical installations and services for buildings, industrial plants, and infrastructure. The company offers solutions for heating, cooling, ventilation, security, automation, and electrical systems. Caverion is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.

name: SILMAASEMA OYJ
summary: Silmäasema Oyj is a Finnish optical retail chain that offers eye examinations, eyeglasses, contact lenses, and other eye care products and services. The company operates a network of stores across Finland. Silmäasema is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.

name: TERVEYSTALO OYJ
summary: Terveystalo Oyj is a Finnish healthcare service company providing a wide range of primary, secondary, and occupational healthcare services. The company operates through a network of clinics and hospitals, providing both physical and digital healthcare solutions. Terveystalo is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.

name: ROVIO ENTERTAINMENT OYJ
summary: Rovio Entertainment Oyj is a Finnish video game developer best known for creating the Angry Birds franchise. The company develops and publishes mobile games, and also licenses its intellectual property for various consumer products and entertainment experiences. Rovio Entertainment is headquartered in Espoo, Finland.

name: Forbo Holding AG
summary: Forbo Holding AG produces and sells floor coverings, building and construction adhesives, and power transmission and conveyor belt solutions in Switzerland and internationally. The company operates through two divisions, Flooring Systems and Movement Systems. The Flooring Systems division develops, produces, and sells linoleum, vinyl floorings, entrance flooring systems, carpet tiles, needle felt floor coverings, washable textile floorings, and building and construction adhesives, as well as various accessory products for installation, processing, cleaning, and care of flooring. This division also provides ready-made adhesives for floor covering installations, parquet flooring, and ceramic tiles, as well as leveling compounds for the construction industry under the trade name of Eurocol. Its products are used in public buildings, department stores, hospitals and other healthcare facilities, schools, libraries, commercial and office spaces, leisure centers, shops, hotels, restaurants, and cafeterias; and for applications in the residential market. The Movement Systems division offers conveyor and processing belts, plastic modular belts, power transmission belts, and timing and flat belts under the Siegling brand name. Its products are used in various applications in industry, trade, and the service sector, including conveyor and processing belts in the food industry; treadmill belts in fitness studios; and flat belts in mail distribution centers. The company was founded in 1928 and is headquartered in Baar, Switzerland.

name: Forbo Holding AG
summary: Forbo Holding AG produces and sells floor coverings, building and construction adhesives, and power transmission and conveyor belt solutions in Switzerland and internationally. The company operates through two divisions, Flooring Systems and Movement Systems. The Flooring Systems division develops, produces, and sells linoleum, vinyl floorings, entrance flooring systems, carpet tiles, needle felt floor coverings, washable textile floorings, and building and construction adhesives, as well as various accessory products for installation, processing, cleaning, and care of flooring. This division also provides ready-made adhesives for floor covering installations, parquet flooring, and ceramic tiles, as well as leveling compounds for the construction industry under the trade name of Eurocol. Its products are used in public buildings, department stores, hospitals and other healthcare facilities, schools, libraries, commercial and office spaces, leisure centers, shops, hotels, restaurants, and cafeterias; and for applications in the residential market. The Movement Systems division offers conveyor and processing belts, plastic modular belts, power transmission belts, and timing and flat belts under the Siegling brand name. Its products are used in various applications in industry, trade, and the service sector, including conveyor and processing belts in the food industry; treadmill belts in fitness studios; and flat belts in mail distribution centers. The company was founded in 1928 and is headquartered in Baar, Switzerland.

name: VIRBAC SA
summary: Virbac SA is a French company that develops, manufactures, and distributes veterinary pharmaceuticals and vaccines for companion and food animals. They offer a range of products for various animal health needs. Virbac is headquartered in Carros, France.

name: LATECOERE
summary: Latecoere is a French aerospace company involved in the design, development, and manufacturing of aerostructures and interconnection systems. The company provides solutions for aircraft manufacturers and operators. Latecoere is headquartered in Toulouse, France.

name: GAUMONT SA
summary: Gaumont SA is a French film production and distribution company. The company produces and distributes films and television programs, as well as operates cinemas. Gaumont is headquartered in Neuilly-sur-Seine, France.

name: BASTIDE LE CONFORT MEDICAL
summary: Bastide Le Confort Médical SA is a French company specializing in the distribution of medical equipment and home healthcare services. The company offers a range of products and services for elderly and disabled people. Bastide Le Confort Médical is headquartered in Caissargues, France.

name: LUMIBIRD
summary: Lumibird is a French company specializing in laser technologies. They design, manufacture and market high-performance lasers for scientific, industrial and medical applications. Lumibird is headquartered in Lannion, France.

name: BOLLORE SE
summary: Bolloré SE is a French investment holding conglomerate with interests in transport and logistics, communications and media, electricity storage and solutions, and plantations. The company has a diverse portfolio of businesses and investments. Bolloré is headquartered in Puteaux, France.

name: ROBERTET SA - CDV 87
summary: Robertet SA is a French company specializing in the creation, manufacturing and sales of fragrances, flavors and natural ingredients. It caters primarily to the perfume, cosmetics, food and beverage industries. Robertet SA is headquartered in Grasse, France.

name: LISI
summary: LISI is a French industrial group specializing in the manufacture of fasteners and assembly components. The company serves the aerospace, automotive, and industrial sectors. LISI is headquartered in Belfort, France.

name: Hermes International SCA
summary: Hermès International S.A. is a French luxury goods manufacturer specializing in leather, lifestyle accessories, home furnishings, perfume, jewellery, watches and ready-to-wear. The company is known for its high-quality craftsmanship and iconic designs. Hermès is headquartered in Paris, France.

name: S.T. DUPONT
summary: S.T. Dupont is a French manufacturer of luxury goods such as lighters, pens, leather goods, and other accessories. The company is known for its craftsmanship and use of precious materials. S.T. Dupont is headquartered in Paris, France.

name: HIGH CO
summary: High Co SA is a French company specializing in retail marketing and communication services. The company provides services such as in-store media, digital marketing, and data analytics to retailers and brands. High Co is headquartered in Aix-en-Provence, France.

name: UBISOFT Entertainment
summary: Ubisoft Entertainment SA is a French video game company that develops, publishes, and distributes interactive entertainment products worldwide. The company creates popular game franchises such as Assassin's Creed, Far Cry, and Tom Clancy's. Ubisoft is headquartered in Montreuil, France.

name: SOGECLAIR SA
summary: SOGECLAIR SA is a French engineering company providing design, development, and manufacturing services for the aerospace, automotive, and rail industries. The company offers solutions for aircraft interiors, vehicle systems, and railway equipment. SOGECLAIR is headquartered in Blagnac, France.

name: Haulotte Group SA
summary: HAULOTTE GROUP designs, manufactures, and sells self-propelled aerial work platforms and telehandlers for people and material lifting. The company offers a range of products including scissor lifts, telescopic booms, articulating booms, and vertical masts, serving various industries such as construction, infrastructure, and industrial maintenance; headquarters are located in L'Horme, France. They also provide services such as financing, training, and maintenance.

name: ITS GROUP
summary: ITS GROUP is an IT services company providing consulting, integration, and managed services. The company specializes in cloud computing, cybersecurity, and digital transformation solutions for businesses across various sectors; headquarters are located in France. ITS Group aims to support companies in their digital evolution by providing tailored and innovative technological solutions.

name: EUROMEDIS GROUPE
summary: EUROMEDIS GROUPE is a French company specializing in the distribution and maintenance of medical equipment. They offer a range of products and services for healthcare professionals, including equipment for sterilization, disinfection, and operating rooms; headquarters are located in France. The group aims to provide reliable and innovative solutions to improve healthcare practices.

name: ORAPI
summary: ORAPI is a French company specializing in the manufacturing and distribution of professional hygiene, cleaning, and maintenance products. The company offers a wide range of solutions for various sectors, including industry, healthcare, and food processing, with a focus on performance and safety; headquarters are located in Lyon, France. ORAPI aims to provide effective and environmentally responsible solutions for its customers' needs.

name: AIR LIQUIDE SA
summary: AIR LIQUIDE SA is a multinational industrial gases company that supplies oxygen, nitrogen, hydrogen, and other gases to various industries. The company operates in sectors such as healthcare, energy, and manufacturing, providing gases, technologies, and services; headquarters are located in Paris, France. Air Liquide invests in research and development to create innovative solutions for its customers.

name: TotalEnergies SE
summary: TOTALENERGIES SE is a global multi-energy company that produces and markets fuels, natural gas, and electricity. The company operates in more than 130 countries and is committed to providing affordable, reliable, and clean energy; headquarters are located in Courbevoie, France. TotalEnergies is involved in oil and gas exploration, production, refining, and marketing, as well as renewable energy sources such as solar and wind.

name: ACCOR SA
summary: ACCOR SA is a multinational hospitality company that owns, manages, and franchises hotels, resorts, and residences. The company operates a wide range of brands, from luxury to economy, with a presence in numerous countries; headquarters are located in Issy-les-Moulineaux, France. Accor provides accommodation and related services to business and leisure travelers worldwide.

name: BOUYGUES SA
summary: BOUYGUES SA is a diversified industrial group operating in construction, media, and telecommunications. The company's activities include construction of buildings and infrastructure, television broadcasting, and mobile network operation; headquarters are located in Paris, France. Bouygues aims to provide innovative and sustainable solutions in its various sectors of operation.

name: DANONE
summary: DANONE is a multinational food and beverage company with a focus on dairy products, plant-based products, waters, and specialized nutrition. The company's brands include Activia, Evian, and Nutricia, catering to various consumer needs and preferences; headquarters are located in Paris, France. Danone aims to promote health and well-being through its product offerings.

name: Pernod Ricard SA
summary: PERNOD RICARD SA is a global alcoholic beverage company that produces and distributes a wide range of spirits and wines. The company's portfolio includes brands such as Absolut Vodka, Chivas Regal, and Martell cognac, sold in markets around the world; headquarters are located in Paris, France. Pernod Ricard focuses on building premium brands and engaging consumers through memorable experiences.

name: NRJ GROUP
summary: NRJ GROUP is a French multimedia company primarily involved in radio broadcasting and television production. The company operates several radio stations, including NRJ, Chérie FM, and Nostalgie, as well as producing television content; headquarters are located in Paris, France. NRJ Group targets a wide range of audiences with its diverse media offerings.

name: DASSAULT AVIATION SA
summary: DASSAULT AVIATION SA is a French aerospace company that designs, manufactures, and supports military aircraft, business jets, and space systems. The company's products include the Rafale fighter jet and the Falcon business jet family; headquarters are located in Saint-Cloud, France. Dassault Aviation is known for its technological innovation and expertise in aerospace engineering.

name: GROUPE IRD
summary: GROUPE IRD is a French investment company that focuses on providing financial support to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in the Hauts-de-France region. The group offers various investment solutions, including equity financing and loans, to help businesses grow and develop; headquarters are located in Lille, France. GROUPE IRD plays a role in the regional economic development by supporting local businesses.

name: Vivendi SE
summary: VIVENDI SE is a French media and content group with interests in music, television, publishing, and advertising. The company owns Universal Music Group, Canal+ Group, Havas, and Editis; headquarters are located in Paris, France. Vivendi operates globally in the media and entertainment sectors.

name: Lagardere SA
summary: LAGARDERE SA is a French media group operating in publishing, travel retail, and sports and entertainment. The company owns Hachette Livre, Lagardère Travel Retail, and Lagardère Sports and Entertainment; headquarters are located in Paris, France. Lagardère focuses on creating, distributing, and managing content and experiences for consumers worldwide.

name: SPIR COMMUNICATION
summary: SPIR COMMUNICATION is a French media company specializing in classified advertising and specialized press. The company operates websites and publications focused on real estate, employment, and automotive sectors; headquarters are located in Levallois-Perret, France. SPIR COMMUNICATION connects buyers and sellers through its various platforms and media channels.

name: Orange SA
summary: ORANGE is a French multinational telecommunications operator providing mobile, fixed-line, internet, and television services. The company operates in numerous countries across Europe, Africa, and the Middle East; headquarters are located in Paris, France. Orange aims to provide connectivity and digital services to consumers and businesses.

name: MARSEILL TUNNEL PRADO-CARENA
summary: MARSEILL TUNNEL PRADO-CARENA operates the Prado-Carenage tunnel in Marseille, France. It is a toll road that provides an alternative route through the city center; headquarters are located in Marseille, France. The company's business model is based on collecting tolls from users of the tunnel.

name: BASSAC SA
summary: BASSAC SA is a holding company that invests in various businesses, primarily in the energy and real estate sectors. The company's portfolio includes stakes in companies involved in renewable energy projects and property development; headquarters are located in Paris, France. BASSAC SA seeks to generate long-term value through its strategic investments.

name: CLARANOVA
summary: CLARANOVA is a software company specializing in personalized customer relationship management (CRM) and marketing automation solutions. The company provides software and services that help businesses manage customer interactions, automate marketing campaigns, and improve customer engagement; headquarters are located in Lyon, France. Claranova aims to empower businesses to build stronger relationships with their customers.

name: ENCRES DUBUIT
summary: ENCRES DUBUIT manufactures and sells screen printing inks and related products. Their products are used in various industries, including graphic arts, industrial printing, and packaging; headquarters are located in France. The company provides solutions for printing on different materials.

name: Netgem SA
summary: NETGEM SA is a provider of solutions that enable telecom operators to deliver digital entertainment experiences to their customers. They provide set-top boxes, software platforms, and cloud-based services for accessing and managing digital content; headquarters are located in Paris, France. Netgem aims to help operators compete in the evolving digital entertainment landscape.

name: HEXAOM
summary: HEXAOM, formerly known as Maisons France Confort, is a French homebuilder specializing in single-family homes. The company designs, builds, and renovates residential properties across France; headquarters are located in Saint-Herblain, France. Hexaom offers a range of housing options and services to meet the needs of individual customers.

name: BUREAU VERITAS SA
summary: BUREAU VERITAS SA provides testing, inspection, and certification services to businesses worldwide. The company helps clients ensure that their products, assets, and processes meet quality, health, safety, environmental, and social responsibility standards; headquarters are located in Neuilly-sur-Seine, France. Bureau Veritas serves a wide range of industries, including construction, energy, and consumer products.

name: Laurent-Perrier SA
summary: LAURENT-PERRIER is a Champagne house producing and selling a range of premium champagnes. They are known for their focus on Chardonnay grapes and innovative winemaking techniques; headquarters are located in Tours-sur-Marne, France. The company distributes their champagne globally.

name: GPE GROUPE PIZZORNO
summary: GPE GROUPE PIZZORNO Environnement is a French company specializing in waste management and environmental services. The company provides services such as waste collection, sorting, treatment, and recycling to municipalities and businesses; headquarters are located in Nice, France. GPE GROUPE PIZZORNO Environnement aims to promote sustainable waste management practices.

name: IPSEN
summary: IPSEN is a global specialty pharmaceutical company focused on innovative medicines in oncology, neuroscience, and rare diseases. The company develops and commercializes treatments that address unmet medical needs in these therapeutic areas; headquarters are located in Boulogne-Billancourt, France. Ipsen operates worldwide.

name: SES IMAGOTAG
summary: SES IMAGOTAG is a company that develops and markets electronic shelf labels (ESLs) and digital retail solutions. Their ESLs allow retailers to dynamically update prices and product information on shelves, improving efficiency and customer experience; headquarters are located in Nanterre, France. SES-imagotag's solutions are used by retailers worldwide.

name: Verimatrix SA
summary: VERIMATRIX SA provides security and business intelligence solutions for digital content and over-the-top (OTT) video services. The company offers solutions for content protection, anti-piracy, and data analytics to help content owners and distributors secure and monetize their content; headquarters are located in Aix-en-Provence, France. Verimatrix serves the global media and entertainment industry.

name: TECHNICOLOR - REGR
summary: TECHNICOLOR - REGR is a company providing technology and services to the media and entertainment industry. Their portfolio encompasses visual effects, animation, post-production, and content distribution solutions; headquarters are located in Paris, France. Technicolor aims to enable creative storytelling and deliver immersive experiences to audiences worldwide.

name: AXWAY SOFTWARE SA
summary: AXWAY SOFTWARE SA provides software solutions for API management, data integration, and secure file transfer. Their products enable businesses to connect and manage data across various systems and applications; headquarters are located in Scottsdale, Arizona (USA) and Paris, France. Axway aims to help organizations accelerate digital transformation and improve business agility.

name: EOS IMAGING SA
summary: EOS IMAGING SA develops and markets orthopedic imaging solutions. Their EOS system provides low-dose, full-body 2D/3D imaging for musculoskeletal conditions; headquarters are located in Paris, France. EOS imaging aims to improve the diagnosis and treatment of orthopedic disorders.

name: SQLI
summary: SQLI SA-REG is a digital experience company that helps businesses design, implement, and manage digital solutions. They offer services in consulting, technology, and marketing to help clients improve their online presence and customer engagement; headquarters are located in Levallois-Perret, France. SQLI aims to empower businesses to thrive in the digital age.

name: ERYTECH PHARMA
summary: ERYTECH PHARMA is a biopharmaceutical company that develops innovative therapies for rare forms of cancer and other severe diseases. Their ERYCAPS platform uses red blood cells to encapsulate therapeutic enzymes or drugs, improving their delivery and efficacy; headquarters are located in Lyon, France. Erytech Pharma aims to provide new treatment options for patients with unmet medical needs.

name: Elior Group SA
summary: ELIOR GROUP is a multinational contract catering and support services company. The company provides food services, cleaning, and other facility management services to businesses, schools, hospitals, and other organizations; headquarters are located in Paris, France. Elior Group operates in various countries around the world.

name: JACQUES BOGART
summary: JACQUES BOGART is a French company that designs, manufactures, and markets perfumes, cosmetics, and clothing. The company operates under various brands, including Jacques Bogart, Ted Lapidus, and Chevignon; headquarters are located in Paris, France. Jacques Bogart distributes its products globally.

name: Fundamenta Real Estate AG
summary: Fundamenta Real Estate AG, a real estate company, invests in, acquires, develops, and holds residential properties with a focus on the mid-range rental segment in German-speaking Switzerland. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Zug, Switzerland.

name: Feintool International Holding AG
summary: Feintool International Holding AG, together with its subsidiaries, provides fineblanked, formed steel components, and punched electro sheet metal products in Germany, the United States, Japan, and China. It operates through two segments, System Parts and Fineblanking Technology. The System Parts segment develops, produces, and sells high-precision system components and assemblies using fineblanking and forming technology, as well as electronic sheet stamping; and sells production-specific tools to third-party customers. The Fineblanking Technology segment develops, manufactures, and sells presses, tools, peripheral systems, and various related services. It provides its products for use in automobile industry, such as engine, chassis, transmission, safety systems, peripheral drives, and seat mechanisms applications, as well as for application in mechanical engineering, power generation, electric motors and drives, tools and household, and medical technology. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Lyss, Switzerland. Feintool International Holding AG is a subsidiary of Artemis Beteiligungen I AG.

name: Galenica AG
summary: Galenica AG operates as a healthcare provider in Switzerland and internationally. It operates through two segments, Health & Beauty, and Services. The Health & Beauty segment operates 522 pharmacies, including 366 owned pharmacies and 156 partner pharmacies under the Amavita, Sun Store, and Coop Vitality brands. This segment also offers medication for treatment of patients at home; launches and distributes a portfolio of consumer health, pharmaceutical, and parapharmaceutical products; and marketing and sale services to partners in the healthcare market. The Services segment provides range of specialized pre-wholesale services, including storage, distribution, and debt collection to pharmaceutical and healthcare companies. This segment also offers logistics services for the healthcare market; master data for the healthcare market; management software solutions for pharmacies; and develops tools to securely manage, communicate, and distribute sensitive health data and enhance patient safety. The company was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Bern, Switzerland.

name: GAM Holding AG
summary: GAM Holding AG is a publicly owned asset management holding company. The firm provides its services to institutions, financial intermediaries and private investors. Through its subsidiaries, the firm manages separate client focused equity and fixed income portfolios. Through its subsidiaries, it also launches and manages equity, fixed income, and balanced mutual funds. Through its subsidiaries, the firm invests in public equity and fixed income markets. GAM Holding AG is based in Zurich, Switzerland with an additional office in Geneva, Switzerland and London, United Kingdom.

name: Carlo Gavazzi Holding AG
summary: Carlo Gavazzi Holding AG, together with its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, and markets electronic control components for building and industrial automation markets. The company's products include sensors, monitoring relays, timers, energy management systems, solid state relays, electronic motor controllers, safety devices, and fieldbus systems. It also designs and manufactures signaling equipment and safety relays for the railways market. The company offers its products to original equipment manufacturers of packaging machines, plastic injection molding machines, agriculture machines, food and beverage production, conveying and material handling equipment, door and entrance control systems, lifts, and escalators, as well as heating, ventilation, and air conditioning devices. It markets its products through a network of sales companies and independent distributors, as well as through system integrators. The company operates in Europe, the Middle East, Africa, North America, and the Asia-Pacific. Carlo Gavazzi Holding AG was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Steinhausen, Switzerland.

name: Speedy Hire Plc
summary: Speedy Hire PLC is a tool and equipment hire company based in the United Kingdom. The company provides a range of equipment for hire and sale, as well as associated services, to the construction, infrastructure, and industrial markets. Speedy Hire's headquarters are in Newton-le-Willows, United Kingdom.

name: AVON PROTECTION PLC
summary: Avon Protection PLC designs, manufactures, and supplies respiratory protection equipment and related products for military, law enforcement, and industrial customers worldwide. Their product line includes respirators, filters, and escape hoods, enhancing user safety in hazardous environments. The company is headquartered in Melksham, United Kingdom.

name: BREWIN DOLPHIN HOLDINGS PLC
summary: Brewin Dolphin Holdings PLC is a wealth management firm offering a range of financial planning and investment management services to private clients, charities, and intermediaries. The company provides personalized advice and tailored investment solutions. Brewin Dolphin is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: TCLARKE PLC
summary: TClarke PLC is a building services contractor providing electrical, mechanical, and technology solutions to the construction industry. The company's services include design, installation, and maintenance of building systems. TClarke is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: CLARKSON PLC
summary: Clarkson PLC is a provider of integrated shipping services, including shipbroking, financial services, support, and research. The company operates globally, offering expertise across various shipping markets. Clarkson PLC is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: CRANSWICK PLC
summary: Cranswick PLC is a food producer supplying a range of fresh pork, poultry, cooked meats, and pastry products to the UK food retail market. The company focuses on high-quality, sustainable food production. Cranswick is headquartered in Hull, United Kingdom.

name: SCHRODERS PLC-NON VOTING
summary: Schroders PLC is a global asset management company offering a range of investment solutions to institutions, intermediaries, and individuals. The company manages investments across a variety of asset classes, including equities, fixed income, and real estate. Schroders is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: ELEMENTIS PLC
summary: Elementis PLC is a specialty chemicals company providing additives to various industries, including personal care, coatings, and energy. Their products enhance the performance and properties of their customers' formulations. Elementis is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: BAE SYSTEMS PLC
summary: BAE Systems PLC is a global defense, aerospace, and security company, providing a wide range of products and services for air, land, and sea forces, as well as advanced electronics, security, and information technology solutions. The company serves government and commercial customers worldwide. BAE Systems is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: British American Tobacco p.l.c.
summary: British American Tobacco PLC is a global tobacco company that manufactures and sells cigarettes, tobacco and other nicotine products. The company's brands include Dunhill, Kent, Lucky Strike, and Rothmans. British American Tobacco is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: GO-AHEAD GROUP PLC
summary: Go-Ahead Group PLC is a passenger transport operator providing bus and rail services in the United Kingdom and internationally. The company operates a large fleet of buses and trains, serving millions of passengers daily. Go-Ahead Group is headquartered in Newcastle upon Tyne, United Kingdom.

name: STANDARD CHARTERED PLC
summary: Standard Chartered PLC is a multinational banking and financial services company. It operates a network of over 1,200 branches and outlets across more than 70 countries. The company is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: HAYS PLC
summary: Hays PLC is a global recruitment company, providing specialist recruitment services across a wide range of industries and professions. The company helps employers find qualified candidates for permanent, temporary, and contract positions. Hays PLC is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: MITIE Group PLC
summary: Mitie Group PLC is a facilities management and professional services company. They provide a range of services to businesses and the public sector, including cleaning, security, engineering, and catering. Mitie Group is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: NATIONAL EXPRESS GROUP PLC
summary: National Express Group PLC is a public transport operator providing bus, coach, and rail services in the UK, North America, and Europe. The company operates a fleet of buses and coaches, serving millions of passengers annually. National Express Group is headquartered in Birmingham, United Kingdom.

name: OXFORD INSTRUMENTS PLC
summary: Oxford Instruments PLC designs, manufactures, and supports high-technology tools and systems with a focus on nanotechnology, advanced materials, and quantum technology. The company's products are used in research and industrial applications across a range of sectors. Oxford Instruments is headquartered in Abingdon, United Kingdom.

name: PEARSON PLC
summary: Pearson PLC is a global education company providing educational materials, technologies, assessments, and related services to learners of all ages. The company operates in three primary segments: Assessment & Qualifications, Virtual Learning, and English Language Learning. Pearson is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: EUROMONEY INSTL INVESTOR PLC
summary: Euromoney Institutional Investor PLC is a global business-to-business media group focused on providing essential information, data, and events to the banking, finance, and legal industries. The company's brands include Euromoney, Institutional Investor, and Legal Week. Euromoney Institutional Investor is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: Rio Tinto plc
summary: Rio Tinto PLC is a leading global mining group that focuses on finding, mining and processing the Earth's mineral resources. The company's products include iron ore, aluminum, copper, diamonds and uranium. Rio Tinto has operations worldwide and is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: RENOLD PLC
summary: Renold PLC is a manufacturer of high-precision engineered power transmission products, including industrial chains, gearboxes, couplings, and vibratory feeders. The company serves various industries, including manufacturing, energy, and transportation. Renold is headquartered in Manchester, United Kingdom.

name: RICARDO PLC
summary: Ricardo PLC is a global engineering, technical, and environmental consultancy, providing services to the automotive, transport, energy, and defense sectors. The company offers a range of services, including product development, testing, and certification. Ricardo is headquartered in Shoreham-by-Sea, United Kingdom.

name: TATE & LYLE PLC
summary: Tate & Lyle PLC is a global provider of ingredients and solutions for the food, beverage, and industrial markets. The company transforms corn, tapioca, and sugar into ingredients and solutions for food and other industries. Tate & Lyle is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: TRIFAST PLC
summary: Trifast PLC is a global manufacturer and distributor of industrial fasteners, including screws, bolts, nuts, and related products. The company supplies fasteners to various industries, including automotive, electronics, and construction. Trifast PLC is headquartered in Uckfield, United Kingdom.

name: TITON HOLDINGS PLC
summary: Titon Holdings PLC designs, manufactures, and supplies ventilation systems and window and door hardware for residential buildings. The company's products include window and door hardware, ventilation systems, and heat recovery systems. Titon Holdings is headquartered in Colchester, United Kingdom.

name: TRIAD GROUP PLC
summary: TRIAD GROUP PLC is a software and IT services company based in the UK. They provide digital solutions, consulting, and managed services to public and private sector clients, focusing on areas like digital transformation and data analytics. Their headquarters are in Godalming, UK.

name: VIDENDUM PLC
summary: VIDENDUM PLC is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) that aims to acquire a business operating in the technology, media or telecoms sectors. The company focuses on identifying and acquiring businesses with growth potential. Videndum PLC is based in the UK.

name: SYNTHOMER PLC
summary: SYNTHOMER PLC is a specialty chemicals company that develops and markets polymers for coatings, adhesives, construction, and other industries. They operate globally, providing innovative solutions to enhance product performance. The company is headquartered in Harlow, UK.

name: Intertek Group Plc
summary: Intertek Group PLC is a multinational assurance, inspection, product testing and certification company. It provides a range of services to manufacturers, retailers, and distributors worldwide to ensure their products meet quality, safety, and regulatory standards. Intertek is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: Burberry Group plc
summary: BURBERRY GROUP PLC is a British luxury fashion company, manufacturing clothing, fashion accessories, and fragrances. Its business model focuses on designing, sourcing, manufacturing, and retailing luxury goods through a global network of stores, concessions, and digital platforms, headquartered in London, UK. The company is known for its iconic trench coats, signature check pattern, and commitment to craftsmanship.

name: NANOCO GROUP PLC
summary: NANOCO GROUP PLC is a materials science company that develops and manufactures quantum dots and other nanomaterials. Their business model involves licensing and supplying their materials to manufacturers of displays, lighting, and other applications, headquartered in Runcorn, UK. The company focuses on improving energy efficiency and color quality.

name: SHELL PLC
summary: SHELL PLC is an integrated energy company involved in the exploration, production, refining, and marketing of oil and natural gas, as well as renewable energy sources. Their business model focuses on providing energy solutions to meet global demand, generating revenue through the sale of oil, gas, and related products. The company's headquarters are in London, UK.

name: Rentokil Initial plc
summary: RENTOKIL INITIAL PLC provides pest control, hygiene, and workwear services. Their business model involves offering services to businesses and homes to control pests, maintain hygiene standards, and provide workwear solutions, generating revenue through service contracts and product sales. The company is headquartered in Crawley, UK.

name: HELICAL PLC
summary: HELICAL PLC is a property investment and development company. Their business model involves acquiring, developing, and managing commercial properties, generating revenue through rental income and property sales. The company's headquarters are in London, UK.

name: IP GROUP PLC
summary: IP GROUP PLC invests in intellectual property-based businesses, primarily in the UK and US. Their business model involves identifying promising technologies, providing capital and support to develop these technologies into successful companies, and generating returns through equity stakes and exits. The company is headquartered in London, UK.

name: Ashmore Group plc
summary: ASHMORE GROUP PLC is an emerging markets asset manager. Their business model involves managing investments in emerging markets for institutional clients, generating revenue through management fees based on assets under management. The company is headquartered in London, UK.

name: EXPERIAN PLC
summary: EXPERIAN PLC is a global information services company. Their business model involves providing data and analytics to businesses and consumers, helping them manage credit risk, prevent fraud, and improve decision-making, generating revenue through data subscriptions and analytics services. The company is headquartered in Dublin, Ireland.

name: PZ CUSSONS PLC
summary: PZ CUSSONS PLC is a consumer goods company that manufactures and markets personal care and household products. Their business model involves producing and selling a range of branded consumer goods through retail channels, generating revenue through product sales. The company is headquartered in Manchester, UK.

name: Hochschild Mining PLC
summary: HOCHSCHILD MINING PLC is a precious metals mining company. Their business model involves exploring for, developing, and operating precious metal mines, generating revenue through the sale of gold and silver. The company is headquartered in London, UK.

name: PENDRAGON PLC
summary: PENDRAGON PLC is an automotive retailer. Their business model involves selling new and used vehicles, providing aftersales services, and offering finance and insurance products, generating revenue through vehicle sales, service contracts, and finance commissions. The company is headquartered in Annesley, UK.

name: Whitbread PLC
summary: WHITBREAD PLC operates hotels and restaurants. Their business model revolves around providing hospitality services through brands like Premier Inn and various restaurant chains, generating revenue through accommodation, food, and beverage sales. The company is headquartered in Dunstable, UK.

name: BROWN (N) GROUP PLC
summary: BROWN (N) GROUP PLC is a digital retailer that specializes in fashion that fits and flatters. Their business model involves offering clothing and footwear online and through catalogues, generating revenue through online retail sales. The company is headquartered in Manchester, UK.

name: 3I GROUP PLC
summary: 3I GROUP PLC is an international investment manager. Their business model involves investing in private equity, infrastructure, and debt management, generating revenue through investment returns and management fees. The company is headquartered in London, UK.

name: CAPITA PLC
summary: CAPITA PLC is a business process outsourcing company. Their business model involves providing a range of services including customer management, IT, and HR to public and private sector clients, generating revenue through service contracts and project fees. The company is headquartered in London, UK.

name: TYMAN PLC
summary: TYMAN PLC designs and manufactures engineered products for niche markets. Their business model involves creating and selling bespoke engineering solutions to industries such as aerospace and healthcare, generating revenue through product sales. The company is headquartered in Fareham, UK.

name: FRESNILLO PLC
summary: FRESNILLO PLC is a precious metals mining company. Their business model involves exploring for, developing, and operating silver and gold mines, generating revenue through the sale of mined resources. The company is headquartered in Mexico City, Mexico.

name: INCHCAPE PLC
summary: INCHCAPE PLC is an automotive distributor and retailer. Their business model involves distributing and retailing vehicles, as well as providing aftersales services, generating revenue through vehicle sales, service contracts, and finance commissions. The company is headquartered in London, UK.

name: A.G. BARR PLC
summary: A.G. BARR PLC is a soft drinks manufacturer. Their business model involves producing and selling a range of soft drinks brands, generating revenue through product sales. The company is headquartered in Cumbernauld, Scotland.

name: VESUVIUS PLC
summary: VESUVIUS PLC provides engineering services and systems to the steel and foundry industries. Their business model involves supplying consumable products and services to improve the efficiency and quality of metal production, generating revenue through product sales and service contracts. The company is headquartered in London, UK.

name: INTEGRAFIN HOLDINGS PLC
summary: Integrafin Holdings PLC is the holding company of the James Hay Partnership, a UK platform provider for financial advisers and their clients. The platform offers a range of investment, retirement, and tax planning solutions. Integrafin is headquartered in Salisbury, UK.

name: BOSTON INTERNATIONAL HOLDING
summary: BOSTON INTERNATIONAL HOLDING is involved in investment activities, focusing on various sectors including property and financial markets. They aim to generate returns for shareholders through their investment portfolio. The company is based in the UK.

name: QUILTER PLC
summary: Quilter PLC is a wealth management company providing advice, investments and wealth management services. They offer financial planning advice and investment solutions. Quilter is headquartered in London, UK.

name: XPS PENSIONS GROUP PLC
summary: XPS Pensions Group PLC provides a range of pension and employee benefits services in the UK. The company offers actuarial, administration, investment consulting, and defined contribution consulting services to pension schemes and employers. XPS Pensions Group is headquartered in Reading, UK.

name: TEN ENTERTAINMENT GROUP PLC
summary: TEN Entertainment Group PLC operates a chain of ten-pin bowling and family entertainment centers in the UK. The company offers bowling, amusement arcades, food and beverage services, and other leisure activities. TEN Entertainment is headquartered in Cranfield, UK.

name: CHESTERFIELD RESOURCES PLC
summary: CHESTERFIELD RESOURCES PLC is a mineral exploration company focused on identifying and developing copper and gold projects. They primarily operate in North America and aim to create value through exploration success. The company is based in London, UK.

name: BANK OF GEORGIA GROUP PLC
summary: Bank of Georgia Group PLC is a UK incorporated holding company of JSC Bank of Georgia, a leading universal bank in Georgia, offering a broad range of retail banking, corporate banking, and investment management services. The Group also has operations in Belarus through its subsidiary, BNB Bank. Bank of Georgia Group is headquartered in London, UK.

name: VODAFONE GROUP PLC
summary: Vodafone Group PLC is a telecommunications company that provides mobile and fixed-line services, including voice, data, and broadband. The company operates in Europe and Africa and offers a range of products and services for consumers and businesses. Vodafone Group is headquartered in Newbury, UK.

name: RM PLC
summary: RM PLC provides products, services and managed solutions, mostly to UK educational markets. They offer technology and resources to schools, universities, and other educational institutions. RM PLC is headquartered in Abingdon, UK.

name: Treatt plc
summary: Treatt PLC manufactures and supplies a wide range of natural extracts and ingredients for the flavour, fragrance and consumer product industries. They offer a wide portfolio of ingredients across a number of different product lines. Treatt PLC is headquartered in Bury St Edmunds, UK.

name: FDM GROUP HOLDINGS PLC
summary: FDM Group Holdings PLC is a professional services company focused on recruiting, training, and deploying IT and business consultants. The company provides services to a range of industries, including finance, technology, and government. FDM Group is headquartered in London, UK.

name: Spire Healthcare Group PLC
summary: Spire Healthcare Group PLC is a private hospital group in the United Kingdom. The company provides a range of healthcare services, including surgery, diagnostics, and outpatient care. Spire Healthcare Group PLC is headquartered in London, UK.

name: SPIRAX-SARCO ENGINEERING PLC
summary: Spirax-Sarco Engineering PLC manufactures and markets steam and thermal energy management systems. The company's products and services are used in a variety of industries, including food and beverage, pharmaceutical, and healthcare. Spirax-Sarco Engineering PLC is headquartered in Cheltenham, UK.

name: ASCENTIAL PLC
summary: Ascential PLC is a business-to-business media company that provides information, events, and data analytics to a variety of industries. The company's brands include Cannes Lions, WGSN, and Money20/20. Ascential PLC is headquartered in London, UK.
